scripts.start: npm run clear && rm -f package-lock.json && npm install && node scripts/fix-static-url.js local && nuxt dev --host
scripts.generate: npm install github:c4a8/c4a8-web-shared-components#master && node scripts/fix-static-url.js production && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=8192 nuxt generate
scripts.clear: rm -rf .nuxt  && rm -rf node_modules/.cache/ && echo Nuxt Cache cleared.
scripts.relink: npm link shared-components && npm run dev
